TOURS.title: Manali Kasol: Solang Valley & Atal Tunnel Adventure

itinerary.title: Delhi → Manali (Overnight Journey)
itinerary.desc: Board AC Volvo from ISBT Kashmere Gate at 6 PM. Journey through the scenic Beas Valley corridor. Onboard team introduction and trip briefing. Dinner on your own at Murthal highway dhabas.

itinerary.title: Arrive Manali — City Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Arrive Manali by 10 AM. Check-in and freshen up. Visit the ancient Hadimba Devi Temple set in cedar forest. Explore Manu Temple, Club House park, and the famous Mall Road for local Kullu shawls and Himachali caps. Evening at Old Manali cafes.

itinerary.title: Solang Valley → Atal Tunnel → Sissu
itinerary.desc: Drive to Solang Valley (2480m) — snow activities in winter: skiing, snowmobiling, snow trek. Drive through the engineering marvel — 9.2km Atal Tunnel — to reach the breathtaking Sissu village. Visit Sissu waterfall and lush green meadows. Return to Manali.

itinerary.title: Kullu River Rafting → Manikaran → Kasol
itinerary.desc: Optional river rafting in Kullu rapids (₹600 extra — highly recommended!). Drive through Parvati Valley to the sacred Manikaran Gurudwara — take a dip in natural hot springs. Arrive Kasol — the Mini Israel of India. Check-in riverside camp. Evening at cafes.

itinerary.title: Kasol Free Day — Optional Kheerganga Trek
itinerary.desc: Morning free to explore Kasol market and Chalal village. Optional Kheerganga Trek (12km, ₹500 guide fee) — natural hot spring pool at the top with panoramic Himalayan views. Evening departure for Delhi by private vehicle.

itinerary.title: Delhi Arrival — Trip Ends
itinerary.desc: Arrive Delhi by 10-11 PM. Trip ends with memories of the mountains that will last a lifetime. Our team will be available for future trip enquiries!

faqs.q: What is the best time to visit Manali and Kasol?
faqs.a: October to June is the ideal time. December to February offers heavy snow in Solang Valley (2-6 feet) with skiing and snowmobiling. March to June has pleasant weather (5-20°C) perfect for trekking. Monsoon (July-September) brings lush greenery but landslide risk on Manali roads.

faqs.q: Is this Manali Kasol tour suitable for first-time travelers?
faqs.a: Yes, absolutely! This is a beginner-friendly group tour with no prior trekking experience required. Our experienced trip leaders handle all logistics, accommodation, and activities. Even solo travelers and first-timers feel completely comfortable and safe.

faqs.q: What should I pack for the Manali Kasol trip?
faqs.a: Essential packing: Warm clothes (3-4 thermal layers for winter, 1-2 layers for summer), waterproof jacket or rain poncho, trekking/sports shoes (not casual footwear), sunscreen SPF 50+, personal medications, original ID proof (Aadhaar/Passport), power bank, and an adventurous spirit!

faqs.q: How do we travel from Delhi to Manali in this package?
faqs.a: We travel by AC Volvo overnight bus from ISBT Kashmere Gate, Delhi at 6 PM. The journey takes 14-16 hours through scenic mountain roads. This is the most cost-effective and comfortable mode for group travel on this route.

faqs.q: Can I extend or customize this Manali Kasol package?
faqs.a: Absolutely! We offer full customization — add Spiti Valley extension (3-4 days), book private cab instead of group Volvo, upgrade to 4-star hotels, or design a complete honeymoon package. WhatsApp us at +91 62684 96389 to design your perfect trip.

faqs.q: Is Kasol safe for solo female travelers?
faqs.a: Yes, Kasol is generally safe for solo female travelers. Our trips always have a professional trip leader present. The Parvati Valley has an active traveler community. We recommend staying with the group, especially at night, and following basic travel safety practices.

TOURS.seoDesc: Book Manali Kasol group tour from Delhi. 6 days 5 nights including Solang Valley snow, Atal Tunnel, Manikaran Gurudwara. Starting ₹6,999/person. Fixed Saturday departures. 4.8⭐ rated by 245+ travelers.

TOURS.title: Kedarnath Yatra & Char Dham Trek 2025

itinerary.title: Haridwar → Devprayag → Guptkashi
itinerary.desc: Pickup from Haridwar railway station at 6 AM. Drive through the sacred Devprayag — confluence of Alaknanda and Bhagirathi rivers forming the Ganga. Arrive Guptkashi by evening. Check-in hotel. Visit ancient Vishwanath Temple and Ardhnarishwar Temple. Briefing about the Kedarnath trek.

itinerary.title: Guptkashi → Sonprayag → Gaurikund → Trek Begins
itinerary.desc: Early morning drive to Sonprayag. Board mandatory government shuttle to Gaurikund (3km, ₹50). Yatra registration verification. Begin the 18km Kedarnath trek from Gaurikund (1,982m). Trek through rhododendron forests, stone-paved paths, and Himalayan meadows. Halt at Jungle Chatti (6km) or Bheembali (9km) depending on pace.

itinerary.title: Kedarnath Darshan — The Most Sacred Day
itinerary.desc: Early morning puja and abhishek at Kedarnath Temple (3,583m) — one of the 12 Jyotirlingas of Lord Shiva. Experience the divine aura as thousands of devotees chant 'Har Har Mahadev' at dawn. VIP darshan arranged. Free time for meditation and photography. Trek back to Gaurikund. Drive to Guptkashi.

itinerary.title: Guptkashi → Rishikesh — Evening Ganga Aarti
itinerary.desc: Drive via Devprayag again for sunrise photography at the sacred confluence. Arrive Rishikesh by afternoon. Visit Laxman Jhula and Ram Jhula suspension bridges. Evening Ganga Aarti at Triveni Ghat, Rishikesh — an absolutely mesmerizing spiritual experience with thousands of oil lamps floating on the Ganga.

itinerary.title: Rishikesh → Haridwar Har ki Pauri → Delhi
itinerary.desc: Morning yoga session at ghats (optional, free). Visit Haridwar for Har ki Pauri Ganga Aarti. Shopping at Haridwar market (Patanjali products, rudraksha, holy items). Depart for Delhi. Arrive Delhi by midnight. Trip ends with divine blessings.

faqs.q: When does Kedarnath Temple open in 2025?
faqs.a: Kedarnath Temple opens on Akshaya Tritiya (April 30, 2025) and closes on Bhai Dooj (October 22, 2025). The portal opening muhurat is announced on Mahashivratri. Best months to visit: May, June, September, October. Avoid monsoon (July-August) due to landslide risk.

faqs.q: How difficult is the Kedarnath trek? Can senior citizens do it?
faqs.a: The Kedarnath trek from Gaurikund is 18km one-way with 1,600m elevation gain. Difficulty: Moderate (takes 6-8 hours at comfortable pace). Pony (horse) charges ₹2,500-4,000, Palki (doli) ₹4,000-5,000, and Helicopter ₹3,500-4,500 per person are available for seniors, children, and those with health conditions.

faqs.q: Is Yatra registration mandatory for Kedarnath 2025?
faqs.a: Yes, Char Dham Yatra biometric registration is MANDATORY under Uttarakhand Government regulations since 2022. Register online at registrationandtouristcare.uk.gov.in (opens March 2025) or at registration centres in Haridwar and Rishikesh. It is completely free. We assist all our guests with registration.

faqs.q: What is the Kedarnath helicopter ticket price in 2025?
faqs.a: Kedarnath helicopter charges approximately ₹3,500-4,500 per person one-way from Phata, Guptkashi, or Sersi helipads. Round-trip costs ₹7,000-9,000. Helicopter slots must be booked 2-3 months in advance as they sell out quickly in peak season (May-June). Book on irctc.co.in or directly with operators.

faqs.q: What to pack for Kedarnath Yatra in May?
faqs.a: May packing list for Kedarnath: Heavy woolen jacket (temperature at temple is 5-10°C even in May), rain poncho (sudden showers), trekking shoes with grip, thermal innerwear, woolen cap & gloves, sunscreen SPF 60, personal medications (especially altitude sickness tablets), Aadhaar card (mandatory for registration), and sufficient cash (no ATMs at Kedarnath).

TOURS.seoDesc: Book Kedarnath Yatra tour package 2025 from Delhi/Haridwar. 5 days 4 nights with Guptkashi stay, 18km Kedarnath trek, VIP darshan pass, Ganga Aarti. ₹10,500/person. 5.0⭐ rated by 189+ pilgrims.
TOURS.keywords: kedarnath yatra package 2025, kedarnath tour from delhi, char dham trek, kedarnath registration 2025, kedarnath helicopter tour, kedarnath yatra cost per person
TOURS.directAnswer: Kedarnath Yatra package from Delhi costs ₹10,500 per person for 5 days 4 nights with Humsafar Community. Package includes transport from Haridwar, hotel stay in Guptkashi, Kedarnath trek with guide, VIP darshan, Ganga Aarti at Rishikesh. Kedarnath Temple opens April 30, 2025.

TOURS.title: Jaisalmer Desert Safari & Golden Fort Experience
highlights: Sam Sand Dunes Camel & Jeep Safari
inclusions: Desert Camp Stay with Attached Washroom

itinerary.title: Arrive Jaisalmer — Golden City Exploration
itinerary.desc: Arrive Jaisalmer station. Transfer to hotel. After freshen-up, visit the magnificent Jaisalmer Fort (Sonar Qila) — the only fully inhabited medieval fort in the world and a UNESCO World Heritage site. Explore Patwon Ki Haveli, Salim Singh Ki Haveli with intricate Rajasthani jharokha architecture. Sunset at magical Gadisar Lake — a 14th-century reservoir.

itinerary.title: Sam Sand Dunes — Ultimate Desert Adventure
itinerary.desc: Morning visit to Kuldhara — an abandoned village with a 200-year-old curse and haunting stories. Drive to Sam Sand Dunes (42km from Jaisalmer). Camel safari at golden hour — watch the sun melt into the Thar Desert horizon. Overnight desert camp under a million stars. Bonfire, Rajasthani folk music (Langas), and spectacular Kalbeliya snake dance performance.

itinerary.title: Desert National Park & Jaisalmer Hidden Gems
itinerary.desc: Morning visit Desert National Park — habitat of the Great Indian Bustard (critically endangered) and other desert wildlife. Explore Bada Bagh — royal cenotaphs of Jaisalmer rulers with stunning sandstone chhatris. Optional excursion to Tanot Mata Temple (120km) — miraculously survived 1971 Indo-Pak war bombs. Sunset at Vyas Chhatri — best 360° viewpoint over the golden city.

itinerary.title: Jaisalmer Departure
itinerary.desc: Morning free for last-minute shopping — buy authentic Bandhani fabric, Rajasthani leheriya dupattas, handmade leather mojris, camel leather goods, and silver jewellery. Transfer to Jaisalmer railway station for onward journey. Trip ends with golden memories of the Thar.

faqs.q: What is the best time to visit Jaisalmer for desert safari?
faqs.a: October to March is the perfect time for Jaisalmer desert safari. Weather is pleasant (15-25°C days, 5-10°C nights). The December-January Jaisalmer Desert Festival is spectacular. Avoid May-July when temperatures reach 45-48°C. Monsoon (July-September) brings rare but beautiful rain to the desert.

faqs.q: Is desert camping safe in Jaisalmer?
faqs.a: 100% safe! Our desert camps are RTDC (Rajasthan Tourism) approved with proper security guards, clean attached toilet facilities, comfortable beds with heavy blankets (essential for cold desert nights), and first aid kits. Family-friendly with children's activities available. The remoteness actually adds to the magical experience.

TOURS.seoDesc: Book Jaisalmer desert safari tour package. 4 days 3 nights including Sam Sand Dunes camel safari, overnight desert camp, Jaisalmer Fort. Starting ₹7,500/person. 4.9⭐ rated by 212 travelers.
TOURS.keywords: jaisalmer desert safari package 2025, jaisalmer tour package, sam sand dunes camping, jaisalmer fort tour, rajasthan desert tour, overnight desert camp jaisalmer
TOURS.directAnswer: Jaisalmer desert safari package costs ₹7,500 per person for 4 days 3 nights with Humsafar Community. Package includes Sam Sand Dunes camel safari, overnight desert camp, Jaisalmer Fort visit, Kuldhara village, folk dance evening. October to March is the best time to visit.

BLOGS.title: Kedarnath Yatra 2025: Complete Guide to Registration, Trek, Helicopter & Budget
BLOGS.author: Humsafar Team
BLOGS.excerpt: Planning Kedarnath Yatra in 2025? This complete guide covers online registration process, 18km trek breakdown, helicopter booking, hotels in Guptkashi, packing list, and exact per-person budget.

content.text: Kedarnath Yatra is not just a pilgrimage — it is India's most dramatic spiritual journey. Located at 3,583 meters in the Garhwal Himalayas of Uttarakhand, the Kedarnath Temple is one of the 12 Jyotirlingas of Lord Shiva and part of the sacred Char Dham circuit. The 18km trek through alpine meadows, moraines, and Himalayan forests to reach the temple is a transformative experience that millions undertake each year.

Kedarnath Temple opens on Akshaya Tritiya (April 30, 2025) and closes on Bhai Dooj (October 22, 2025). The auspicious muhurat for portal opening is announced on Mahashivratri each year at Ukhimath, where the deity resides during winter months. In 2025, an estimated 15-20 lakh pilgrims are expected to visit Kedarnath.
How to Register for Kedarnath Yatra 2025 (Mandatory)
Biometric registration is MANDATORY for all Kedarnath pilgrims since 2022 under Uttarakhand Government regulations. Without registration, you will not be allowed entry at Sonprayag checkpoint.

items: Offline Registration: Centers at Haridwar bus stand, Rishikesh ISBT, Sonprayag
Documents Required: Aadhaar Card (mandatory), 1 passport photo, medical certificate (age 60+)
Cost: Completely FREE — Uttarakhand Government does not charge for registration
Print your registration QR code — show it at multiple checkpoints during Yatra

content.text: The 18km Kedarnath Trek: Complete Route Breakdown

The Kedarnath trek starts from Gaurikund (1,982m) and ends at Kedarnath Temple (3,583m) — 18km one-way with 1,600m total elevation gain. At a comfortable pace with rest stops, it takes 6-8 hours. The trail is well-maintained and paved with stone steps for most of the route.

items: Gaurikund (1,982m) — Starting point. Hot sulphur kund for pre-trek dip.
Jungle Chatti (2,628m) — 6km mark. Food stalls, rest points.
Bheembali (3,000m) — 9km mark. Government facility, last major rest point.
Lincholi (3,200m) — 11km mark. First views of Kedarnath valley.
Kedarnath (3,583m) — 18km. The divine destination. Overwhelming spiritual energy.

content.text: The mountains are calling and I must go — but to Kedarnath, it is the soul that is called, not just the body. Every step of that 18km is a walking meditation.
Kedarnath Budget 2025 — Per Person Cost Breakdown

Complete budget for a 5-day Kedarnath Yatra from Delhi: Train tickets (Delhi-Haridwar-Delhi, AC Chair): ₹800-1,500. Shared taxi Haridwar to Guptkashi: ₹600-800. Hotel Guptkashi (per night): ₹800-2,500. Gaurikund to Kedarnath pony (optional): ₹2,500-4,000. Food on trek (per day): ₹400-800. Total budget trip: ₹9,000-13,000. With Humsafar all-inclusive package: ₹10,500 per person.

faqs.q: How long is the Kedarnath trek and how difficult is it?
faqs.a: The Kedarnath trek from Gaurikund is 18 km one-way with 1,600m elevation gain. It takes 6-8 hours at a comfortable pace. Difficulty: Moderate. Suitable for anyone with basic fitness who can walk 6-8 hours. Pony, Palki (palanquin), and Helicopter options available for those who cannot trek.

faqs.q: Is Kedarnath Yatra registration completely free?
faqs.a: Yes, the Char Dham Yatra biometric registration at registrationandtouristcare.uk.gov.in is completely free of charge. Beware of agents charging money for registration — report them to Uttarakhand Police.

faqs.q: What is the Kedarnath helicopter ticket price in 2025?
faqs.a: Kedarnath helicopter ticket costs approximately ₹3,500-4,500 per person (one-way) from Phata/Guptkashi/Sersi helipads. Round trip: ₹7,000-9,000. Book 2-3 months in advance on irctc.co.in for peak season slots.

faqs.q: Which is better for Kedarnath — Trek or Helicopter?
faqs.a: Trekking gives the authentic pilgrimage experience — the energy builds with every step, interaction with fellow devotees is beautiful, and arriving with your own effort creates unparalleled spiritual fulfilment. Helicopter is ideal for those with health conditions, limited time, or senior citizens. Our recommendation: Trek up, Helicopter back.

BLOGS.seoTitle: Kedarnath Yatra Guide 2025 — Registration, Trek, Helicopter, Budget | Humsafar
BLOGS.seoDesc: Complete Kedarnath Yatra 2025 guide. How to register online, 18km trek breakdown, helicopter booking (₹3,500-4,500), hotels in Guptkashi, packing list, and per-person budget (₹9,000-13,000).
BLOGS.keywords: kedarnath yatra 2025, kedarnath registration 2025, kedarnath trek guide, kedarnath helicopter booking 2025, kedarnath temple opening date 2025, char dham yatra guide
BLOGS.directAnswer: Kedarnath Temple opens on April 30, 2025 (Akshaya Tritiya) and closes on October 22, 2025. Registration at registrationandtouristcare.uk.gov.in is mandatory and free. The 18km trek from Gaurikund takes 6-8 hours. Total trip budget: ₹9,000-13,000 per person.
